label: Technology
heading: 6-layer reinforced glass
description: Every Eagle Glass protector is engineered with six precision layers that work together to deliver unmatched clarity, strength, and longevity.

layers.name: Anti-fingerprint coating
layers.description: Advanced oleophobic coating repels oils and smudges, keeping the screen pristine all day.

layers.name: Anti-scratch hardened layer
layers.description: Ultra-hard surface layer provides first-line defense against daily scratches and micro-abrasions.

layers.name: 9H tempered glass
layers.description: Military-grade 9H hardness resists scratches from keys, coins, and everyday impacts.

layers.name: Shatter-proof film
layers.description: Integrated safety film holds glass fragments together on impact - zero sharp edges, zero risk.

layers.name: Anti-static layer
layers.description: Eliminates static charge buildup to prevent dust attraction and ensure flawless touch response.

layers.name: Silicon adhesive
layers.description: Bubble-free precision adhesive aligns perfectly on first try, removes cleanly without residue.
